name: Artichoke Alfredo
recipeIngredient: one can artichokes (not packed in oil)
4-5 fresh tomatoes, chopped into large chunks
1/2 cup fresh basil, chopped (or 3 tablespoons chopped dried basil)
1/2 cup (or more) non-fat soy milk or low-fat soy milk or rice milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare fettucini, macaroni, or spaghetti noodles al dente.
2. In a non-stick pan, saute onion and garlic in a little of the liquid from the can of artichokes.
3. Add chopped tomatoes and basil to the pan and continue sauting until softened.
4. Cut artichokes into small pieces and add them to the pan with the remaining sauce ingredients (flour, soy or rice milk).
5. Mix thoroughly, adding more flour if needed to achieve desired thickness.
6. Cook over low heat just enough to combine all ingredients and reach desired consistency for the sauce.
7. Top cooked pasta with the artichoke sauce.
Serves 2, each serving: Calories 210, Fat 1.5 g. (6% calories from fat), Carbohydrate 46 g., Protein 10.7 g.
